result.failure: MORI SHMEM process-group init called dist.broadcast_object_list(..., src=0, group=ep_group); global rank 0 is not part of the second EP4 subgroup containing global ranks 4-7.
result.first_observed_exception: ValueError: Global rank 0 is not part of group <torch.distributed.distributed_c10d.ProcessGroup object ...>
result.interpretation: EP4-on-8 no longer fails on the TorchTitan bridge world-size guard. The next blocker is MORI's torch-process-group SHMEM bootstrap assuming global rank 0 belongs to every group.
result.next_action: Initialize MORI SHMEM with shmem_get_unique_id plus an EP-local group_src=0 broadcast, then rerun the same 8x FSDP8/EP4 no-AC six-step gate.
